text.title: Go → TypeScript DTO Contract via tygo Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: install-tygo
step.action: go install github.com/gzuidhof/tygo@latest; commit go.tool entry.

step.name: first-generate
step.action: Run tygo generate; resolve naming collisions; commit output dir.
